name: MTOTA Spring Occupational Therapy Symposium 2026 - Missoula
summary: Montana Occupational Therapy Association spring symposium. CEU sessions on pain science, hand therapy, and community Occupational Therapy practice.

name: Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive - Nov 14-16 2026
summary: Three-day hand therapy CEU intensive covering tendon repair, splinting, HTCC prep. Hosted at MSU Bozeman. CE credits provided.

name: Missoula Climbing Gym - Route Setting Volunteer Day
summary: Volunteer route setting day. Open to experienced climbers - help set new problems on the cave wall. Light snacks provided.

name: Missoula Climbing Gym - Summer Bouldering Competition
summary: Annual summer bouldering comp. Open divisions for all levels. Cash prizes for top finishers. Free spectator entry.

name: MTOTA Occupational Therapy Occupational Therapy Workshop - Virtual
summary: Quarterly virtual workshop for MTOTA occupational therapists. Review Chronic Pain Program Microsite UX, provide professional input, and vote on feature priorities.

name: Bitterroot Rehab Occupational Therapy Pain Science Grand Rounds
summary: Interdisciplinary grand rounds presentation on contemporary pain science for the Bitterroot Rehab professional team. CE credits for Occupational Therapy and trainer staff.

name: Blue Mountain Trail Stewardship Day - Spring 2026
summary: Volunteer trail work day on Blue Mountain near Missoula. Tread repair, drainage clearing, signage. Tools provided. Bring lunch and water.

name: MTOTA Occupational Therapy Student Fieldwork Q&A - Virtual
summary: Virtual panel for Occupational Therapy students completing fieldwork in Montana. Practicing OTs answer questions about Level II fieldwork, mentorship, and career in Montana.

name: Montana Occupational Therapy License Renewal CEU Day - Missoula
summary: Full-day license renewal CEU event. 8 CEUs covering ethics, pain management, remote coaching, and documentation standards. Montana-licensed OTs only.

name: Bitterroot Rehab - New Staff Occupational Therapy Orientation
summary: Half-day orientation for new Occupational Therapy staff at Bitterroot Rehabilitation Center. Covers EMR onboarding, documentation standards, and team introductions.

name: AOTA Annual Conference 2026 - Remote Watch Party Missoula
summary: MTOTA-hosted viewing party for AOTA 2026 Annual Conference keynotes and sessions. Watch together, discuss, network. AOTA membership and registration required.

name: Lead Climbing Clinic - Outdoors and Indoor Technique
summary: Two-session clinic covering lead falls, runout management, and clipping efficiency. Taught by certified climbing instructors. Limited to 8 subscribers.

name: occupational-therapy-trainer Interdisciplinary Pain Management Symposium
summary: Half-day event for Bitterroot Rehab Occupational Therapy and trainer staff covering interdisciplinary approaches to chronic pain group management and community wellness circle program design.

name: MCWC Chronic Pain Program Chronic Pain Program Microsite - Cohort Participants Feedback Session
summary: Feedback session for occupational therapists who beta-tested Chronic Pain Program microsite v1.3. Occupational Therapy practitioners provide structured feedback on pacing log UX and professional accuracy.

name: Outdoor Bouldering Day Trip - Kootenai Creek
summary: Gym-organized day trip to Kootenai Creek bouldering area near Stevensville. Carpool from gym at 8am. V0-V4 problems. Bring crash pad if you have one.

name: MTOTA Fall Networking Happy Hour - Missoula
summary: Casual networking event for Montana Occupational Therapy practitioners. Connect with colleagues, share resources, and discuss the profession in Montana. No RSVP required but helpful for headcount.

name: Bitterroot Rehab Staff Training - remote coaching Platform Onboarding
summary: Mandatory remote coaching platform onboarding for Bitterroot Rehab professional staff. Covers privacy-compliant setup, scheduling, and remote session delivery.

name: Blue Mountain Fall Hike - Sunrise to Summit
summary: Group sunrise hike to the Blue Mountain summit before fall snow. 7-mile roundtrip, moderate. Meet at trailhead at 5:30am.

name: HTCC Certification Study Group - Missoula Chapter
summary: Monthly in-person study group for OTs pursuing HTCC certification in Montana. Project reviews, practice questions, and peer support.

name: MTOTA Q1 Occupational Therapy Board Meeting - Virtual
summary: Quarterly peer consultation board meeting for MTOTA Occupational Therapy and trainer advisors. Product roadmap review, new feature input, and professional validation discussion.
